source: Split packages/cli/src/kern/signals/dispatch.kern (3178 lines, ~35 functions) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Logical sections: (1) Orchestration helpers lines 1-78 (slashCommandForOrchestrationAction, announceCesarAutoOrchestration), (2) Thread outcome + delegated continuation lines 79-477 (withThreadOutcome through buildReviewAbsorptionPrompt), (3) Cesar plan management lines 1256-1440 (isCesarPlanApprovalInput through askChoiceQuestion), (4) Main dispatchIntent router lines 1438-2784, (5) Plan execution helpers lines 2785-end. Extract each into a new .kern file in signals/ (e.g. dispatch-orchestration.kern, dispatch-continuation.kern, dispatch-plans.kern, dispatch-router.kern, dispatch-plan-exec.kern). The main dispatch.kern should import and re-export from the new modules. Preserve all kern-source annotations and generated TS file references. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/cesar/brain.kern (2034 lines, 3 mega-functions) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. The main function handleCesarBrain (line 63-~2000) contains distinct phases: session setup, tool loop, streaming, response parsing, escalation. Extract helper functions and the commitTurn/commitTurnAndSuggest functions (lines 19-62) into brain-turn-commit.kern. Extract the handleCesarBrain phases into separate files as appropriate (e.g. brain-session-setup.kern, brain-tool-loop.kern, brain-response.kern). Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/surfaces/app-helpers.kern (2359 lines, single AppHelpers module) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Scan for logical groups within the module (event handlers, render helpers, state management, telemetry, composer helpers, etc). Extract each group into a new .kern file in surfaces/ (e.g. app-helpers-events.kern, app-helpers-render.kern, app-helpers-state.kern). The main app-helpers.kern should import and re-export. Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/surfaces/app.kern (2135 lines, AgonApp module) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Sections: module-level mutable refs (line 73), main component, entry point startRepl (line 2101). Extract subcomponent logic and helpers into separate files (e.g. app-component.kern, app-entry.kern). Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/handlers/agent.kern (1384 lines, 4 functions + team section) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Sections: runAgentMode (lines 1-474), runAgentTeam (lines 475-end). Extract into agent-loop.kern and agent-team.kern. The main agent.kern should import and re-export. Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/core/src/kern/cesar/context-thread.kern (1173 lines) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Sections: Path helpers (line 42), Lockfile helpers (line 89), Data types (line 122), Snapshot schema (line 172), Secret redaction (line 220), Token estimation (line 293), Format conversions (line 322), Service (line 360), Active-thread pointer (line 980), Exit flush (line 1011), Checkpoint summarization (line 1099). Group into 2-3 files: context-thread-core.kern (path+lock+types+snapshot+redaction+token+format, ~620 lines) and context-thread-service.kern (service+pointer+flush+summarization, ~550 lines). Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/blocks/engine.kern (1132 lines) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Scan for logical groups (component definitions, helper functions, render logic). Extract into engine-component.kern and engine-helpers.kern. Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/cli/src/kern/cesar/session.kern (1027 lines) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Scan for logical groups (session management, system prompt building, backend resolution). Extract into session-core.kern and session-prompt.kern. Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts

Split packages/core/src/kern/sessions/session-resume.kern (1023 lines) into focused modules of max 500 lines each. Scan for logical groups. Extract into session-resume-core.kern and session-resume-helpers.kern. Preserve all kern-source annotations. After splitting, run: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts
